stemHtml: After a frequency change, it is important to listen out carefully on the active frequency before transmitting…

options.a: To allow the controller to call in case he/she was already looking for your aircraft before you changed to this new frequency.
options.b: To make sure the radio is receiving and therefore also transmitting properly on this new frequency.
options.c: To confirm that the correct frequency is selected by using the call sign of the ground station.
options.d: To ensure that the transmission does NOT interrupt a dialogue or block another transmission.
